quote: Grand Maester Munkun's examination revealed her maidenhead was broken

name: The Maiden's Day Ball ("Cattle Show")
quote: "The Maiden's Day Cattle Show," Mushroom would name the ball

text: Bastard-born, he was reckoned a dutiful if unheroic knight
Four-and-ten and a year older than the king, brown of hair and eye with a broad freckled face and crooked teeth
Her father brought her to court early and arranged suppers with the king, who gave her one of the little queen's dolls
The court fool and author of the *Testimony*, much in the king's company after Jaehaera's death
